scripts._link-server-assets: if [ -d apps/server ]; then test -d apps/web/dist && test -d apps/marketing/dist && test -d packages/emails/public/emails && mkdir -p apps/server/dist && ln -sfn ../../web/dist apps/server/dist/web && ln -sfn ../../marketing/dist apps/server/dist/marketing && ln -sfn ../../../packages/emails/public/emails apps/server/dist/emails; fi
scripts.clean-install: find . -name "node_modules" -type d -exec rm -rf {} + && rm bun.lock && bun install
